mapper.sql: select r.roadway,a.group_no,a.borehole_no,s.shift_info,f.* FROM t_actual_flushing f LEFT JOIN t_actual_borehole a ON a.id =f.borehole_id LEFT JOIN t_roadway r ON r.id = a.roadway_id LEFT JOIN t_shiftinfo s ON f.shift_id=s.id
mapper.insert:
insert into t_actual_flushing
borehole_id, shift_id, date_flushing, time_begin_flushing, time_end_flushing, total_time_flushing, water_pressure_during_flushing, gas_CONC_before_flushing, gas_CONC_after_flushing, punching_paragraph1, punching_paragraph2, see_rock_case, see_coal_case, actual_coal_amount_flushed, completion_ratio_flushed_coal, coal_density, person_construction, reception_time, gas_change_during, exception_phenomena, person_checking, other_person, chargehand, file, create_by, update_by, update_time, remark, create_time
#{boreholeId}, #{shiftId}, #{dateFlushing}, #{timeBeginFlushing}, #{timeEndFlushing}, #{totalTimeFlushing}, #{waterPressureDuringFlushing}, #{gasCONCBeforeFlushing}, #{gasCONCAfterFlushing}, #{punchingParagraph1}, #{punchingParagraph2}, #{seeRockCase}, #{seeCoalCase}, #{actualCoalAmountFlushed}, #{coalDensity}, #{completionRatioFlushedCoal}, #{personConstruction}, #{receptionTime}, #{gasChangeDuring}, #{exceptionPhenomena}, #{personChecking}, #{otherPerson}, #{chargehand}, #{file}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
NOW() datetime('now', 'localtime')
mapper.update:
update t_actual_flushing
borehole_id = #{boreholeId}, shift_id = #{shiftId}, date_flushing = #{dateFlushing}, time_begin_flushing = #{timeBeginFlushing}, time_end_flushing = #{timeEndFlushing}, total_time_flushing = #{totalTimeFlushing}, water_pressure_during_flushing = #{waterPressureDuringFlushing}, gas_CONC_before_flushing = #{gasCONCBeforeFlushing}, gas_CONC_after_flushing = #{gasCONCAfterFlushing}, punching_paragraph1 = #{punchingParagraph1}, punching_paragraph2 = #{punchingParagraph2}, see_rock_case = #{seeRockCase}, see_coal_case = #{seeCoalCase}, actual_coal_amount_flushed = #{actualCoalAmountFlushed}, coal_density = #{coalDensity}, completion_ratio_flushed_coal = #{completionRatioFlushedCoal}, person_construction = #{personConstruction}, reception_time = #{receptionTime}, gas_change_during = #{gasChangeDuring}, exception_phenomena = #{exceptionPhenomena}, person_checking = #{personChecking}, other_person = #{otherPerson}, chargehand = #{chargehand}, file = #{file}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time =
NOW() datetime('now', 'localtime')
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_actual_flushing where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select f.*,a.group_no,a.borehole_no, r.roadway,c.borehole_category,p.purpose_borehole,n.navigation_point_name,(f.punching_paragraph2-f.punching_paragraph1) AS punchingparagraphlength FROM t_actual_flushing f LEFT JOIN t_actual_borehole a ON f.borehole_id= a.id LEFT JOIN t_borehole_category c ON a.borehole_categoryid=c.id LEFT JOIN t_navigation_point n ON a.navigation_pointid=n.id LEFT JOIN t_purpose_borehole p ON a.purpose_borehole_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_roadway r ON a.roadway_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_shiftinfo s ON f.shift_id=s.id
mapper.delete:
delete from t_actual_flushing where borehole_id in
#{boreholeIds}
mapper.select: select concat(ab.group_no,"-",ab.borehole_no) AS "boreholecode", ab.` constructionsite` AS "constructionsite",ab.bore_diameter AS "borediameter",db.inclination_angle AS "desangle", ab.inclination_angle AS "actangle",db.borehole_length AS "desboreholelength",ab.borehole_length AS "actboreholelength",ab.depth_1st_rock_seam_start AS "rock1start", ab.depth_1st_rock_seam_end AS "rock1end",ab.depth_1st_coal_seam_start AS "coal1start",ab.depth_1st_coal_seam_end AS "coal1end",ab.depth_2st_coal_seam_start AS "coal2start", ab.depth_2st_coal_seam_end AS "coal2end",ab.depth_2st_rock_seam_start AS "rock2start",ab.depth_2st_rock_seam_end AS "rock2end",ab.depth_3st_rock_seam_start AS "rock3start", ab.depth_3st_rock_seam_end AS "rock3end",af.actual_coal_amount_flushed AS "coalamountflushed",ab.drilling_date AS "drillingdate",ab.drilling_date AS "drillingtime",sg.end_time AS "endtime", ab.person_construction AS "personConstruction",ab.chargehand AS "chargehand",ab.person_checking_video AS "personCheckingvideo",ab.person_checking_site AS "personCheckingsite", ab.hole_sealing_specification AS "holesealingspecification",ab.solid_pipeline_length AS "solidpipelinelength",ab.sieve_pipeline_length AS "sievepipelinelength",ht.hole_seal_type AS "holesealtype", sg.grouting_date AS "groutingdate",sg.actual_amount_bag_grouting AS "actualamountbaggrouting" from t_actual_flushing af LEFT JOIN t_actual_borehole ab ON ab.id=af.borehole_id LEFT JOIN t_sealing_grouting sg ON ab.id=sg.borehole_id LEFT JOIN t_holeseal_type ht ON ht.id=sg.holeseal_typeid LEFT JOIN t_designed_borehole db ON db.group_no=ab.group_no AND db.borehole_no=ab.borehole_no
